message:
Running command: 
# 183 min CPU / ~49 min elapsed. Run still proceeding.
# DRT for this design will take many more hours.
# Going to a very long 12-hour monitoring loop with a 12-hour sleep
sleep 43200

echo "=== DRT MAJOR CHECK $(date) ==="
STEP70_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/70-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log"
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
stat "$STEP70_LOG" | grep -E "(Size|Modify)"
wc -l "$STEP70_LOG"
tail -40 "$STEP70_LOG"
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/"
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null
ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
echo "OpenROAD PID: $ORPID"
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && cat /proc/${ORPID}/status | grep -E "(VmRSS|State|Threads)" && ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print "CPU:"$3"%", "RSS:"$6/1024"MB", "TIME:"$10}' || echo "OpenROAD has EXITED"
wc -l /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/drt_resume.log
tail -30 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/drt_resume.log
ls "$RUN_DIR/final/" 2>/dev/null && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" || echo "final/ not yet"
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | grep "^[0-9]" | sort -n | tail -10
